title: rosa rubiginosa subvar. acanthophora
intro: Rosa rubiginosa subvar. acanthophora, also known as the dog rose, is a variant of the fragrant, flowering rose species native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Rosa rubiginosa subvar. acanthophora include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the flowers and leaves, which can be used as teas or added to topical creams for skin and wound care.
